etimes'Bring an LPG cylinder, get 50 plates of momos': Viral offer grabs internet’s attentionAn Indo-Chinese café chain is offering 50 plates of momos in exchange for a commercial LPG cylinder, drawing attention online amidst ongoing supply disruptions. The unusual "Gas for us, Momos for you!" promotion highlights the restaurant's challenges in maintaining operations and has been humorously dubbed the 'return of the barter system' by social media users.

etimesMan wakes up with bright blue skin, rushed to hospital; unexpected reason revealed laterA man in the UK experienced a shocking transformation after waking up completely blue. Tommy Lynch's skin turned a vibrant blue overnight. Doctors were initially concerned and began urgent tests. The surprising cause was revealed to be dye from new, unwashed navy blue bedsheets. It took several days for the colour to wash off.

etimesAir India Express flight to Phuket sparks panic after tire separates during landing; viral video shows scary momentAn Air India Express flight from Hyderabad to Phuket experienced a harrowing landing due to a nose-wheel issue on March 11. A passenger's viral video captured the intense moments as the aircraft hit the runway forcefully. Despite the rough touchdown and visible damage, the cabin crew managed the situation effectively, ensuring all passengers deplaned safely.
